MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AN ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100056834) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCORMICK BARSTOW SHEPPARD WAYTE & CARRUTH, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP HALL, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL HIPPS, KATHLEEN CERNIGLIA AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-2019 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

DECLARATION OF JESSICA M. BOUJIKIAN IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AN ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100056834) (TRANSACTION ID # 100056834) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCORMICK BARSTOW SHEPPARD WAYTE & CARRUTH, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP HALL, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL HIPPS, KATHLEEN CERNIGLIA AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MCCORMICK BARSTOW SHEPPARD WAYTE & CARRUTH, CHRISTOPHER HALL, KATHLEEN HIPPS' MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF FRESNO IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. THE COURT AWARDS DEFENDANTS $912 IN REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEY'S FEES INCURRING IN MAKING THE MOTION TO TRANSFER; NO FEES ARE AWARDED FOR REVIEWING THE LATE-FILED OPPOSITION OR FOR FILING THE UNNECESSARY REPLY. IN EXERCISING ITS DISCRETION UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 396B(B), THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SELECTION OF VENUE WAS NOT MADE IN GOOD FAITH, GIVEN THE FACTS AND LAW THE PLAINTIFFS KNEW OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN, WHICH ESTABLISHED THAT THE COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WAS NOT THE PROPER VENUE FOR THIS ACTION. FURTHER, DEFENDANTS FIRST REQUESTED THAT PLAINTIFFS STIPULATE TO A CHANGE OF VENUE ON SEPTEMBER 18, 2018, BUT PLAINTIFFS DID NOT ACCEPT THAT REQUEST BEFORE DECEMBER 17, 2018, WHEN THE MOTION WAS FILED. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY TRANSFER COSTS. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MCCORMICK BARSTOW SHEPPARD WAYTE & CARRUTH,, CHRISTOPHER HALL, KATHLEEN HIPPS' MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND FOR REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEY'S FEES.

Defendants' motion to transfer venue to the Superior Court of California, County of Fresno is granted as unopposed. The Court awards defendants $912 in reasonable expenses and attorney's fees incurring in making the motion to transfer; no fees are awarded for reviewing the late-filed opposition or for filing the unnecessary reply. In exercising its discretion under Code of Civil Procedure section 396b(b), the Court finds that the selection of venue was not made in good faith, given the facts and law the plaintiffs knew or should have known, which established that the County of San Francisco was not the proper venue for this action. Further, defendants first requested that plaintiffs stipulate to a change of venue on September 18, 2018, but plaintiffs did not accept that request before December 17, 2018, when the motion was filed.

In addition, Plaintiff is to pay transfer costs. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
